experiments.name: agent_wave_current
experiments.description: More aggressive early game targeting focusing on lowest ship counts instead of distance purely, and relaxing the reserve requirement slightly.

experiments.name: agent_triage_current
experiments.description: Adjusted defensive triage logic. Defend check radius increased to 50, threat_eta increased to 30.

experiments.name: agent_speed_current
experiments.description: Increased safety_threshold buffer from 1.35 to 1.45. Increased launches cap from 4 to 6.

experiments.name: agent_hybrid_current
experiments.description: Send min requirement lowered from 3 to 1.

failure_modes: Over-committing to defense without strong MCTS logic causes losses.
Increasing safety threshold and launches arbitrarily causes inefficiency against strong MCTS opponents.
